text:
Two frogs sat side by side on a pond. They'd swap stories for a long time about their days.

One said, "You have such interesting stories! Last night I had a dream. I dreamed I was a majestic emperor.

I woke up, and thought, oh, what a lovely dream.

I floated over my pool today…

There were thousands of monkeys chatting loudly.
There were hundreds of flamingos paddling.
And several talking frogs.

I went to wake my frog friend.

"Hey, Emperor Froggy!? Wake up!

"You have this fascinating story that I just cannot tell."

He sniffed lazily.

"You know what story I tell?

It has five chapters.

Chapter ... *

* *

There was...

* *

Chapter... *

* *

Chapter... *

* *

And finally...

* *

Emperor frog sighed dreamily.

"I tell the story...

* *

There were...

* * *

That story ends.

I had to come live here.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
